## Checklist

- [ ] Relevant tests and quality gates passed.
- [ ] Public marts, source contracts, jobs, schedules, and docs were updated together.
- [ ] This change does not add a TravelCanary safety score or recommendation.
- [ ] No credentials, `.env`, DuckDB files, source payloads, or live diagnostics are included.
- [ ] Any fixture is minimal and synthetic; any mapping has provenance and reuse terms.
- [ ] Every commit has a DCO 1.1 `Signed-off-by` line.
